scripts.dev:chiubaca: pnpm -w run notes:download && pnpm -w run notes:migrate && pnpm --filter chiubaca.com dev
scripts.notes:download: rm -rf tmp-notes && git clone https://github.com/chiubaca/notes tmp-notes
scripts.chiubaca.com:build: pnpm -w run notes:download && pnpm -w run notes:migrate && pnpm --filter chiubaca.com build
scripts.test:node-env: echo "Current PATH: $PATH" && echo "Node location: $(which node)" && echo "Node version: $(node -v)"
